texto: Im gonna be a pretender the rest of my life. Pretending i dont wish every girl i kiss isnt you. Pretending i dont wish every girl i sleep with isnt you. Im gonna have to pretend i dont wish my next relationship wont be with you. Pretend that i dont wish the girl i get engaged to isnt you. Pretend i dont wish the girl i marry isnt you. Pretend i dont wish the mother of my kids to be you. Pretend its not you i want to spend the rest of my life with. Everything will be a lie the rest of my life. Thats so hard to accept.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Michael A. Perez sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Im gonna be a pretender the rest of my life. Pretending i dont wish every girl i kiss isnt you. P…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, i-miss-you, lost-love, útil em momentos de casamento e termino.
